sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 순신규 ARR이 2억 6,500만 달러로 전년 대비 73% 성장하며 가속됐습니다.
총 ARR은 49억 2,000만 달러로 23% 성장했고 분기 매출은 12억 3,000만 달러로 22% 증가했습니다.
영업현금흐름이 3억 9,800만 달러, 잉여현금흐름이 2억 9,600만 달러로 모두 분기 최대를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 팰컨 플렉스 구독 모델 채택 계정의 ARR이 200% 이상 성장하며 플랫폼 통합 수요가 확대됐습니다.
경영진은 강한 수요를 바탕으로 회계연도 가이던스를 상향했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 비GAAP 영업이익은 2억 6,460만 달러로 전년 2억 70만 달러에서 증가하며 사상 최대를 기록했습니다.
GAAP 구독 매출총이익률은 78%, 비GAAP 기준 81%를 유지했습니다.
GAAP 영업적자는 6,940만 달러로 전년 5,570만 달러에서 다소 확대됐습니다.

watchItems.text: 순신규 ARR 성장 가속이 다음 분기에도 이어지는지, 상향된 가이던스를 충족하는지가 관건입니다.
기록적 현금흐름 창출력이 지속되며 수익성 개선으로 이어지는지 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 crwd-20251202xex991.htm EX-99.1 Document CrowdStrike Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results • Achieves record Q3 net new ARR of $265 million, growth accelerates to 73% year-over-year • Ending ARR reaches $4.92 billion, up 23% year-over-year • Delivers record cash flow from operations of $398 million and record Q3 free cash flow of $296 million • Exceeds $1.35 billion in ending ARR from accounts that have adopted the Falcon Flex subscription model, growing more than 200% year-over-year AUSTIN, Texas, December 2, 2025 -- CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWD), today announced financial results for the third quarter fiscal year 2026, ended October 31, 2025. "CrowdStrike is the enabler of secure AI transformatio  Normalized numeric aliases: $265 million = 2억 6,500만 달러; $4.92 billion = 49억 2,000만 달러; $398 million = 3억 9,800만 달러; $296 million = 2억 9,600만 달러; $1.35 billion = 13억 5,000만 달러; $265 = 265달러; $4.92 = 4.92달러; $398 = 398달러; $1.35 = 1.35달러; $296 = 296달러.

over-year, and we delivered record cash flow from operations of $398 million and record Q3 free cash flow of $296 million. We are capitalizing on the AI-driven demand environment as customers consolidate on the Falcon platform, driving our pipeline to an all-time high. Given this momentum, we are raising our fiscal year 2026 guidance. Additionally, we have increased our second half fiscal year 2026 net new ARR growth expectations to at least 50% year-over-year and remain confident in delivering 20% net new ARR growth for fiscal year 2027 from our increased fiscal year 2026 expectations." Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Highlights • Revenue: Total revenue was $1.23 billion, a 22% inc  Normalized numeric aliases: $398 million = 3억 9,800만 달러; $296 million = 2억 9,600만 달러; $1.23 billion = 12억 3,000만 달러; $1.01 billion = 10억 1,000만 달러; $1.17 billion = 11억 7,000만 달러; $962.7 million = 9억 6,270만 달러; $398 = 398달러; $296 = 296달러; $1.01 = 1.01달러; $1.23 = 1.23달러; $1.17 = 1.17달러; $962.7 = 962.7달러.

ing Revenue (ARR) grew 23% year-over-year to $4.92 billion as of October 31, 2025, of which $265.3 million was net new ARR added in the quarter. • Subscription Gross Margin: GAAP subscription gross margin was 78% for both the third quarter of fiscal 2026 and 2025. Non-GAAP subscription gross margin was 81%, compared to 80% in the third quarter of fiscal 2025. • Income/Loss from Operations: GAAP loss from operations was $69.4 million, compared to $55.7 million in the third quarter of fiscal 2025. Non-GAAP income from operations was a record $264.6 million, compared to $200.7 million in the third quarter of fiscal 2025  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.92 billion = 49억 2,000만 달러; $265.3 million = 2억 6,530만 달러; $69.4 million = 6,940만 달러; $55.7 million = 5,570만 달러; $264.6 million = 2억 6,460만 달러; $200.7 million = 2억 70만 달러; $34.0 million = 3,400만 달러; $16.8 million = 1,680만 달러; $265.3 = 265.3달러; $34.0 = 34.0달러; $264.6 = 264.6달러; $200.7 = 200.7달러; $16.8 = 16.8달러; $0.14 = 0.14달러; $0.07 = 0.07달러.
